user_title: COO & Global Head of Change Execution, WPS

talking_points.headline: McKinsey: Agentic AI Could Cut Bank Operating Costs 20%+ — Pilot Purgatory Threatens Slow Movers
talking_points.context_html: McKinsey's latest research quantifies agentic AI's potential to reduce banking operational costs by 20% or more — equivalent to 9-15% of operating profits — by automating workflows across the 60-70% of total bank cost base tied to operations. The risk is equally stark: banks that stay in pilot mode will see competitors lock in structural cost advantages, with McKinsey naming the threat 'pilot purgatory'. As Global COO overseeing HSBC's WPS change execution programme, this frames both the financial opportunity benchmark and the governance urgency for 2026 AI investment decisions.

source_links.title: McKinsey: Agentic AI Redefining Banking Operations
Agentic AI Will Shake Up Banking Profit Pools

talking_points.headline: HSBC Q1 2026: Wealth Income Up 18% as WPB Anchors the Group's Resilience Narrative
talking_points.context_html: HSBC's Q1 2026 results show wealth income rising 18% year-on-year to $1.659bn within IWPB, with fee and other income up 24% to $1.819bn — anchoring the group narrative against an overall pre-tax profit decline to $9.5bn driven by the non-recurrence of 2025 disposal gains. Net new invested assets of $80bn globally, including $19bn from Asia in Q4 alone, continue to validate the strategic rationale for WPB's APAC investment programme. As Global COO and Adam's direct manager, these results directly inform resource allocation, cost efficiency targets, and change execution priorities for the rest of 2026.

source_links.title: HSBC Q1 2026 Outlook: Resilience in a Transforming World

talking_points.headline: APAC Regulators Tighten on Governance and Cyber Risk — Operational Resilience Enters Enforcement Phase
talking_points.context_html: Deloitte's Q1 2026 APAC regulatory update and EY's Global Outlook both confirm that governance, accountability, and operational resilience requirements are shifting from framework-setting into active enforcement across Japan, Indonesia, Singapore, and Hong Kong, with AI governance and third-party risk obligations tightening simultaneously. Singapore's new environmental risk guidelines and Hong Kong's Phase 2A Sustainable Finance Taxonomy add further compliance load on top of an already heavy APAC regulatory calendar. For Surali's global COO mandate, this elevates the control environment requirements that must be embedded into the WPS change execution framework, supplier governance model, and operational resilience standards.

source_links.title: EY: Four Regulatory Shifts to Watch in 2026

AI & Technology.title: Citi Wealth Unveils Citi Sky — AI-Powered Wealth Advisor Built with Google DeepMind
AI & Technology.summary: Citi Wealth launched Citi Sky on 22 April — an always-on AI advisor using Google DeepMind's Gemini real-time avatar tech, rolling out to Citigold clients from summer 2026.

AI & Technology.title: McKinsey: Agentic AI Will Shake Up Banking, Shrinking Global Profit Pools
AI & Technology.summary: McKinsey warns agentic AI will compress profit pools as efficiency gains are competed away. Slow movers risk 'pilot purgatory' as competitors lock in structural cost benefits.

AI & Technology.title: Merrill and Bank of America Private Bank Launch AI-Powered Meeting Journey
AI & Technology.summary: BofA gave 15,000 advisors integrated AI tools for meeting prep, real-time Zoom note-taking, and automated follow-up — saving up to four hours per client meeting.

AI & Technology.title: AI in Wealth Management: Closing the Implementation Gap
AI & Technology.summary: Only 35% of financial intermediaries actively use AI tools in advisory; just 10.5% do so daily. The piece urges firms to embed AI into core workflows.

HSBC News.title: HSBC Q1 2026: Wealth Income Up 18%, Group Pre-Tax Profit Falls on One-Off Comparator
HSBC News.summary: HSBC Q1 2026: wealth income up 18% YoY to $1.659bn; fee/other income up 24% to $1.819bn. Group pre-tax profit fell to $9.5bn on prior-year disposal gains non-recurrence. IWPB attracted $80bn NNIA globally, $19bn from Asia in Q4.

HSBC News.title: HSBC Wins First HKD Stablecoin Licence; Plans H2 2026 Launch via PayMe
HSBC News.summary: HKMA granted HSBC one of HK's first stablecoin licences (10 Apr 2026); HKD stablecoin launches via PayMe and HSBC HK app in H2 2026 for 3.3M users.

HSBC News.title: HSBC Completes Privatisation of Hang Seng Bank, Delisted January 2026
HSBC News.summary: HSBC completed the court-approved privatisation of Hang Seng Bank on 27 Jan 2026, acquiring the remaining 38% stake for ~HK$290bn, consolidating its HK footprint.

Competitor Intelligence.title: DBS Named World's Best Private Bank 2026 by Euromoney — Historic First for Asia
Competitor Intelligence.summary: DBS Private Bank became the first Asian institution to win Euromoney's World's Best Private Bank 2026, plus inaugural digital assets and safest private bank titles.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Standard Chartered Korea Launches Five-Pillar Next-Gen Private Banking Model
Competitor Intelligence.summary: StanChart Korea revamped its private banking model targeting KRW 1bn+ clients, drawing on systems from SG, HK, and UAE hubs.

Competitor Intelligence.title: Pictet Wealth Recruits UBS 20-Year Veteran Kelvin Tay as APAC CIO
Competitor Intelligence.summary: Pictet Wealth hired Kelvin Tay, former UBS Regional CIO for South Asia Pacific, as APAC CIO — signalling intensifying APAC private banking talent competition.

Private Banking & Wealth.title: Hong Kong Overtakes Singapore in WealthTech Adoption — 93% Digital Access Rate
Private Banking & Wealth.summary: Quinlan & Associates / Allfunds: 93% of HK investors accessed digital wealth services (vs. 85% in SG); 52% comfortable with AI-guided advice (vs. 27%) — driven by neobrokers like Futu.

Regulatory & Markets.title: APAC Financial Services Regulatory Update Q1 2026: Governance and Cyber Risk Dominate
Regulatory & Markets.summary: Deloitte Q1 2026 APAC: governance, accountability, and cyber risk dominate across Japan, Taiwan, Indonesia, SG, and HK. SG launched environmental risk guidelines; HK activated Phase 2A Sustainable Finance Taxonomy.

Regulatory & Markets.title: EY Global Financial Services Regulatory Outlook 2026: Four Critical Shifts
Regulatory & Markets.summary: EY 2026 outlook: four critical shifts — AI governance, climate/sustainability disclosure, operational resilience entering enforcement, and enhanced third-party risk management.

Operations & Change.title: McKinsey: Agentic AI Could Cut Banking Operational Costs by 20% or More
Operations & Change.summary: McKinsey: agentic AI can cut banking ops costs 20%+ (9-15% of operating profits), targeting the 60-70% of cost base tied to operations. Calls for end-to-end workflow rewiring.

Operations & Change.title: Microsoft: Five Predictors for AI Transformation Success in Financial Services 2026
Operations & Change.summary: Microsoft FS practice: five AI transformation predictors — clear executive ownership, modular architecture, governance-first deployment, outcome-based measurement, and workforce capability investment.
